MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Caritas Management is present. Represented by Aaron Patch.
Attorney, Francisco Torres, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Kenneth O. De La Cruz, is present.
Attorney, Matthew Gale , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Comissioner Hewlett, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 612, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-13-2010 is vacated.
